transcript.text: Did you see that movie with Owen Wilson and Gene Hackman where there's the Serbian tracker chasing after Owen Wilson
And he's strapped in the blue sweat suit with the white stripes, three white stripes going down like a soccer suit?
Well, everybody wears those down there. It's crazy.
So then I rode over into Belgrade. Yeah, and I saw all these people in Belgrade wearing that.
I was in Belgrade four nights.
I must have been like weak-minded or lazy at that time because I was in Belgrade four nights.
And I did the tour one day, the full thoroughly tour.
Remember, Belgrade was supposed to be the party capital of...
Man, I should have timed myself so that I don't have to fucking edit this.
Oh, well, it's too late now.
Belgrade is supposed to be the party capital of...
You know what? I'm going to stop it and then start it again.
